home.heroSubtitle: Go-Line connects businesses with trusted couriers — delivering packages across 50+ zones with speed, safety, and full tracking visibility.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Shipping with Go-Line is simple and transparent. From pickup to delivery — every step tracked in real time.
home.step1Desc: Submit your delivery request online or via phone. Tell us the pickup location, destination, and package details — we handle the rest.
home.step2Desc: Our trained courier picks up your package from your location promptly. We scan, verify, and secure every shipment before dispatch.
home.step3Desc: Your package is delivered to its destination with real-time tracking updates. Recipient confirms delivery and you get an instant notification.
home.whySubtitle: We combine technology, trained couriers, and deep local knowledge to deliver results you can count on.
home.feature1Desc: Track every shipment in real time with our smart dashboard. Get instant SMS and email notifications at every delivery milestone.
home.feature2Desc: Our delivery network spans 50+ zones across the country. Whether local or cross-city, we get it there fast.
home.feature3Desc: Our customer support team is available around the clock to assist with any delivery concerns or urgent requests.
home.solutionsTitle: Delivery solutions tailored for your business needs
home.solutionsDesc: Whether you ship 10 parcels or 10,000 — Go-Line has a plan that fits. Scale your delivery operations effortlessly with our flexible service tiers.
home.review1Text: "Go-Line transformed our e-commerce business. Our customers now receive their orders the same day in most zones. The tracking system is outstanding and the team is always responsive."
home.review2Text: "We ship hundreds of parcels weekly and Go-Line handles every single one without a hitch. Their dedicated account manager keeps us updated at every stage. Highly recommended for growing businesses."
home.review3Text: "The best courier service I have used. Fast pickups, real-time tracking, and zero damaged packages. Go-Line is now the backbone of our fulfillment operation."
home.review3Author: Khaled Bin Nasser — Retail Business Owner
home.review4Text: "The dedicated account manager and transparent pricing make Go-Line the most trusted delivery partner we have worked with."

about.heroSubtitle: Go-Line delivers more than packages — we deliver reliability, speed, and peace of mind for businesses of all sizes.
about.missionTitle: Our mission is to make delivery effortless
about.missionDesc:
Go-Line was founded with one goal: to make business deliveries faster, smarter, and completely transparent. We leverage technology and a network of dedicated drivers to ensure every shipment arrives on time.

Whether you're a small business or a large enterprise, our mission is to be the logistics backbone you can rely on every single day.
about.card1Desc: We guarantee same-day and next-day delivery across all covered zones. Speed is our promise to your customers.
about.card2Desc: Outsourcing your delivery to Go-Line reduces overhead costs and frees your team to focus on what matters most.
about.card3Desc: Transparent, competitive pricing with no hidden fees. Choose a plan that fits your delivery volume and budget.
about.card4Desc: Our network spans 50+ delivery zones, ensuring your packages reach every corner of the country reliably.
about.whyTitle: Why Go-Line is the right choice for your business
about.whyDesc: We combine cutting-edge technology, a dedicated courier fleet, and deep local knowledge to deliver a seamless experience for you and your customers.
about.bullet1: Real-time GPS tracking on every shipment;
about.bullet2: Dedicated account manager for business clients;
about.bullet4: Same-day delivery available across all major zones.

services.heroTitle: Delivery services that drive your business forward
services.heroSubtitle: From express shipments to bulk logistics — Go-Line offers flexible, scalable delivery solutions built for modern businesses.
services.sectionTitle: Everything your business needs to ship smarter
services.sectionDesc: Go-Line delivers flexible, scalable shipping solutions — from same-day express to bulk logistics. We handle the last mile so you can focus on growing your business.
services.service1Desc: Same-hour and next-hour delivery available across all major zones. Ideal for urgent, time-sensitive shipments.
services.service2Desc: Plan recurring pickups and deliveries on your schedule — daily, weekly, or custom intervals to fit your operations.
services.service3Desc: Manage large-volume shipments with ease. Our bulk logistics solutions offer competitive rates and dedicated handling.
services.service4Desc: Track every shipment in real time. Clients and recipients receive instant updates at every delivery milestone.
services.trusted1: Dedicated account manager for every client;
services.trusted3: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees;
services.howSubtitle: Shipping with Go-Line is fast and simple. Place your order in minutes and we handle the rest — pickup, delivery, and real-time updates all the way.
services.step1Desc: Submit your shipment details online or via our app. Choose your delivery speed — express, same-day, or scheduled — and confirm pickup time.
services.step2Desc: Our driver arrives at your location on time, verifies the package, and assigns a live tracking number for full visibility.
services.step3Desc: Your shipment is delivered on time with a digital proof of delivery. Automatic notifications keep both sender and recipient informed.

partner.heroSubtitle: Whether you're a delivery driver or a business owner — Go-Line has a place for you. Apply now and start earning or growing.
partner.formTitle: Apply as a Driver or Business Partner
partner.formSubtitle: Fill in the form below and our team will review your application and get back to you within 48 hours.
partner.benefitsDesc: Our partners enjoy competitive pay, flexible hours, and full support from our dedicated operations team. Join hundreds of drivers and businesses already growing with Go-Line.
partner.benefit1Desc: Our operations and driver support teams are available 7 days a week to assist with any questions or delivery issues.
partner.benefit2Desc: Drivers choose their own working hours. Work full-time or part-time — the choice is yours. Our platform makes it easy to manage deliveries on your terms.
partner.benefit3Desc: Every business partner gets a personal account manager to handle onboarding, billing, and daily operational support.
partner.benefit4Desc: Drivers earn competitive per-delivery rates with weekly payouts. Business partners benefit from volume pricing and invoice-based billing.
partner.benefit5Desc: Access analytics dashboards, delivery reports, and performance insights to optimize your shipping strategy and reduce costs.
partner.benefit6Desc: From API integration to SLA management, our team provides full technical and operational support to keep your deliveries running smoothly.
partner.joinDesc: Not sure how to get started? Here are quick answers to the most common questions from drivers and business partners.

faq.heroSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about Go-Line delivery services, tracking, and partnerships.
faq.d_q1: Question 1. How do I place a delivery order with Go-Line?
faq.d_a1:
Placing an order is simple. You can request a pickup through our website or mobile app. Fill in the pickup and drop-off addresses, select your delivery type (Express, Same-Day, or Scheduled), and confirm. Our nearest driver will be assigned immediately.

For business accounts, you can also submit bulk orders via our business portal or API integration.
faq.d_q2: Question 2. What delivery zones does Go-Line currently cover?
faq.d_a2:
Go-Line currently operates across 50+ delivery zones in the UAE, with primary focus on Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Sharjah. We are continuously expanding our coverage to more cities.

To check if your area is covered, enter your postal code on our coverage map.

For inter-city and bulk shipments, contact our business team at partners@go-line.ae for a custom quote.
faq.d_q3: Question 3. What happens if my delivery is late or the package is damaged?
faq.d_a3:
Go-Line offers an SLA-backed on-time delivery guarantee. If a delivery is late due to our error, you will receive credit on your next order.

For damaged packages, file a claim within 24 hours through your account dashboard. Our support team will review and resolve the case within 2 business days.
faq.d_q4: Question 4. Can I schedule recurring deliveries for my business?
faq.d_a4:
Yes. Business accounts can set up recurring pickup schedules — daily, weekly, or on custom intervals. Our scheduler lets you define time windows, preferred drivers, and automatic notifications for each run.

Contact our sales team to activate scheduled delivery on your account and get a volume discount.
faq.t_q1: Question 1. How does Go-Line real-time tracking work?
faq.t_a1: Every order placed through Go-Line is assigned a unique tracking ID. You can follow your shipment live on our web portal or mobile app. The tracking system updates GPS coordinates every 30 seconds, showing driver location, estimated arrival time, and delivery status milestones.
faq.t_q2: Question 2. Can my customers track their own delivery?
faq.t_a2: Yes. When an order is dispatched, the recipient receives an SMS with a tracking link. They can follow the delivery in real time without needing a Go-Line account. Business clients can also embed our tracking widget directly on their own website.
faq.t_q3: Question 3. Does Go-Line integrate with e-commerce platforms?
faq.t_a3: Go-Line offers API integration for Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, and custom platforms. Orders placed on your store can automatically be pushed to Go-Line for fulfillment. Contact our technical team at tech@go-line.ae to request your API credentials.
faq.t_q4: Question 4. What technology does Go-Line use?
faq.t_a4: Our platform runs on a proprietary dispatch engine that uses machine-learning route optimization to assign the nearest available driver and calculate the fastest route. All communications are encrypted. Data is stored in compliance with UAE data protection regulations.
faq.p_q1: Question 1. What are Go-Line's delivery rates?
faq.p_a1:
Pricing depends on delivery type, distance, and package size. Express same-hour deliveries start from AED 25 per shipment. Same-Day deliveries start from AED 15. Bulk and scheduled delivery plans offer significant volume discounts.

Visit our Pricing page or contact sales@go-line.ae for a custom business quote.
faq.p_q2: Question 2. Is there a minimum order volume for business accounts?
faq.p_a2: There is no minimum for individual shipments. Business accounts with 50+ monthly shipments qualify for our Partner Plan with dedicated support and discounted rates. Enterprise clients (500+ monthly) receive a fully custom pricing package.
faq.p_q3: Question 3. How does billing and invoicing work?
faq.p_a3: Individual clients are charged per shipment at the time of booking. Business accounts receive a consolidated invoice at the end of each billing cycle (weekly or monthly, depending on plan). Payments are processed via bank transfer, credit card, or our prepaid wallet system.
faq.p_q4: Question 4. Does Go-Line offer COD (Cash on Delivery) service?
faq.p_a4: Yes. Go-Line supports Cash on Delivery for eligible business accounts. COD amounts collected by our drivers are reconciled and transferred to your designated account within 2 business days. A small COD handling fee applies.
faq.formTitle: Didn't find the answer you are looking for?
faq.formDesc: Submit your question and our support team will get back to you within 24 hours.
